creator: antumdeluge@gmail.com
text:
I can't add any feeds to QuiteRSS. I go to "Add -> Feed", enter the URL, and press "Next". Nothing shows up in the name field so I manually enter something. After hitting "Finish" nothing changes.

I believe that this bug might possibly have to do with a dependency on my system. I recently re-installed and upgraded to FreeBSD 10.1. Some software I installed via Packages and others via Ports. Ever since, I have been fixing dependencies on graphics/png. Many of the Packages were build against PNG 1.5, but I upgraded to 1.6 which replaced 1.5. I have a feeling that the problem may actually have something to do with this, an sqlite dependency, or a qt dependency. Not sure. Manually downloading and compiling from upstream source produces same problems.

I'm not sure how to locate all the software on my system that has been build against PNG 1.5, other than launching it and looking for errors. Is there a way to check all binaries for dependency on libpng15?

Also, running QuiteRSS from terminal creates no output information.
